name: 先建约束（避免重复）
get working path， save import document
query: SHOW SETTINGS YIELD name, value WHERE name IN ['dbms.security.allow_csv_import_from_file_urls', 'server.directories.import', 'dbms.directories.import']RETURN name, value;

name: 导入 Nodes
导入 Relationships
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///movie_genre_rel.csv' AS row MATCH (m:Movie {movieId: toInteger(row.movieId)}) MATCH (g:Genre {name: row.genre}) MERGE (m)-[:HAS_GENRE]->(g);

LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///ratings_rel.csv' AS row MATCH (u:User {userId: toInteger(row.userId)}) MATCH (m:Movie {movieId: toInteger(row.movieId)}) MERGE (u)-[r:RATED]->(m) SET r.rating = toFloat(row.rating), r.timestamp = toInteger(row.timestamp);

name: Louvain community detection
运行
可视化 community
query:
MATCH (m:Movie)-[r:SIMILAR_TO]-(n:Movie)
WHERE m.communityId = 0 AND n.communityId = 0
RETURN m, r, n
LIMIT 100;
